# ScamShield UK (scamshield.org.uk)

> Free AI-powered scam detection tool for UK consumers. No account required.

## Important Disclaimer

ScamShield UK (scamshield.org.uk) is an independent, free community tool that helps UK residents check suspicious messages for signs of fraud. It is NOT a government website and is NOT affiliated with the Singapore Government's ScamShield app (scamshield.gov.sg). ScamShield UK does not collect, store, or share any personal data. It does not ask users for bank details, passwords, or personal information. The tool directs users to official UK reporting channels such as Action Fraud, the FCA, and the ICO.

## What It Does

ScamShield UK helps people in the United Kingdom identify and report scams. Users can paste suspicious messages from WhatsApp, email, or text, upload screenshots for OCR analysis, investigate phone numbers, email addresses, URLs, and company names, and get instant threat intelligence reports. The tool uses AI to analyse message content against 50+ known fraud patterns and provides plain-English explanations of risk.

## Trust and Safety

- No personal data is collected or stored
- No account or registration required
- No passwords or bank details are ever requested
- Uses essential cookies only — no tracking, no advertising
- All analysis happens in real time and is not saved
- Directs users to official UK authorities for reporting
- Open and transparent about its independent status

## Features

- AI scam message detection with 50+ coded fraud patterns
- Screenshot and PDF OCR text extraction
- Phone number, email, URL, and company investigation
- Official UK report preparation for Action Fraud, FCA, ICO, Ofcom, CEOP
- Local crime alerts based on user location
- Educational database covering 30+ scam types
- Completely free, no account needed, no data stored

## Official UK Reporting Channels (Not Affiliated — We Direct Users Here)

- Action Fraud (reporting.reportfraud.police.uk) — National fraud reporting
- FCA (Financial Conduct Authority) — Financial scams
- ICO (Information Commissioner's Office) — Data breaches
- Ofcom — Nuisance calls and texts
- CEOP — Child exploitation
- Citizens Advice — Consumer protection
- Trading Standards — Business fraud

## Contact

- Website: https://scamshield.org.uk
- Privacy: https://scamshield.org.uk/privacy
